title: Trump Misstates Facts in State of the Union Regarding Charlotte Stabbing
summary: Trump incorrectly claimed the suspect in a Charlotte stabbing case came through open borders; the suspect is a U.S. citizen.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the politicization of local crime and potential misinformation spread on a national stage.

title: Swimming Pool Filter Maker Hayward Has Significant Presence in Clemmons, NC
summary: Hayward, a Charlotte-based company, is the largest private employer in Clemmons, NC, with over 1,000 workers.

title: Florence Regional Airport Passenger Numbers Increased in 2025

title: Women Accused of Torturing and Killing Girl in Charlotte, NC
summary: Three women in Charlotte, NC, are charged with the child abuse death of Dominique Moody, allegedly torturing and keeping her in a dog crate.
